synthesized.description: Modern jump-list LNK with LocalBasePath stored as Unicode at LinkInfo offset 0x1C.
Legacy LNK with ANSI LocalBasePath at LinkInfo offset 0x10.
Only 20 bytes — shorter than the 76-byte ShellLinkHeader. Must not over-read or throw.
Full 76-byte header but LinkFlags clears HasLinkInfo; there is no LinkInfo block to read.
Header 0x44 claims 4 length + 4 offset bytes but only 2 trailing bytes exist.
Header 0x01 with a zero length byte — a 0-cluster run must terminate parsing, not loop.
Binary SID S-1-5-18 (LocalSystem): rev=1, subAuthCount=1, authority=5, subAuth=18.
UTF-16LE application id text 'C:\app.exe' that must NOT be misread as a SID.
Claims rev=1 but subAuthCount=0xFF with no sub-authority bytes; must not be parsed as a SID or throw.

requiresRealSample.validationPlan: MFTECmd is N/A; compare against AmcacheParser. Sample hives: github.com/EricZimmerman/Samples.
Compare against AppCompatCacheParser. Needs a real SYSTEM hive.
Compare against SrumECmd. Needs a real ESE database; the idblob fixtures above only cover the SID sub-decode.
Compare against SBECmd. Needs real user hives.
Compare against MFTECmd. The run-list fixtures cover only the DATA run-list sub-parser.
